subcodes.first_line: O beloved one, strange indeed is thy destiny! Our thought had been that thou wouldst abide for a time in the Blessed Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز طالعی عجیب داری فکر ما چنان بود که در بقعه مبارکه اقامت نماای و ایامی
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
